name: BLU Spy [TF2]
description:
The Spy from Team Fortress 2. A mysterious man, working for BLU team. He's a great assassin and a master of disguise. Though, even he has his weak spots and struggles.
Headcanons I use:
- has a PTSD due to his head being severed and kept alive inside of the RED Medic’s fridge.
- his hobby is photography

my twitter (@Mental_Tea)
creator: MentalTea
